title: user authentication and profile management
description: Test user registration, login, social authentication, and profile management including role-based access control to ensure secure and seamless user authentication.

title: destination management with approval workflow
description: Verify CRUD operations on travel destinations with hierarchical categorization, detailed descriptions, photo galleries, and approval workflows to ensure data accuracy and quality.

title: tour management and booking process
description: Test tour package details, availability checks, guide information, and booking capabilities including payment gateway integrations and group booking support.

title: personalized itinerary planning and sharing
description: Validate itinerary creation with day-by-day schedules, activity optimization, resource allocation, budgeting, and public/private sharing including social media integration.

title: user review and rating submission
description: Test review and rating submission for destinations and tours with multi-criteria evaluation, media uploads, moderation, and response handling to maintain quality and trust.

title: rewards points calculation and redemption
description: Verify the rewards system for accurate user points calculation, redemption processes, and loyalty benefits management.

title: emergency services information and alerts
description: Test access to emergency contacts, interactive maps, safety guidelines, real-time alerts, and SOS functionalities including offline access.

title: transportation management and booking
description: Validate transportation schedule information, booking, route planning, price comparison, and environmental impact awareness features.

title: rest api authentication and data retrieval
description: Test REST API endpoints for secure token-based authentication, data retrieval, and management for destinations, tours, itineraries, and reviews.

title: responsive ui and theme toggle
description: Verify the responsive UI behavior on various devices and orientations including landscape special handling and dark mode toggling.
